name: Diabetic Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp liquid sweetener plus 1/2 tsp vanilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the oleo over low heat.
2. Add the chocolate and melt it with the oleo.
3. Mix in the liquid sweetener and vanilla.
4. Remove from heat and blend briefly.
5. Add the softened cream cheese.
6. Fold in the chopped nuts.
7. Pour into a buttered pan and place in the refrigerator.
8. The fudge will keep for one week in the refrigerator.
